title: Softcut - dual-deck crossfaded overdub looper (4 voices)
subtitle: two softcut voices per deck; Rev focuses one. Record-defines-loop

pads.Reverse: swap focused voice; Alt+Rev = save trimmed loop
pads.Seq: re-align all voices (sync); Alt+Seq = save full, hold = erase voice

alt_play: record / overdub (fresh take on an empty voice, sound-on-sound on a full one)
ring: voice transport (red rec / green fwd / cyan rev); focused-voice hue idle; amber while saving
